changes.reason: Run a clean 1DTE companion split attribution test without changing VALID_0DTE routing. The current VALID_1DTE_ONLY sleeve is meaningful but tail-heavier than the core 0DTE pullback/charm sleeves, and the dormant pullback_long_1dte profile is enabled but unreachable unless added to the one-DTE router.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should reveal whether an existing 1DTE pullback/reclaim branch can take some non-breakout 1DTE flow and improve combined 1DTE MAE or PnL per exposure hour. Main tradeoff is cannibalization: reject if breakout_long_1dte loses profitable trades without combined 1DTE PnL, total score, or MAE improving.
recommendation.label: one-dte-pullback-companion-probe
recommendation.rationale: Choose one logical family: 1DTE router attribution. The leader already has strong VALID_0DTE edges and prior direct tightening of profitable sleeves risks profit suppression. The 1DTE slice is underexplored, contributes 20 trades and $1241.8, but has only $159.7/hour and worst MAE -386.75. Activating the dormant pullback_long_1dte route is the least invasive config-only way to test the strategist's companion-split thesis while preserving all current option-confirmed 0DTE behavior and avoiding global veto tightening.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY breakout_long_1dte currently contributes 20 trades, $1241.8 PnL, $159.7/hour, no slow trades, but average MAE -125.5 and worst MAE -386.75. The dormant pullback_long_1dte profile is enabled but absent from the one-DTE router, so there is no current attribution for a 1DTE reclaim/pullback branch.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The companion may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades and reduce total net profit without improving MAE or exposure efficiency.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains at least $1241.8, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_044, 1DTE average or worst MAE improves, breakout_long_1dte retained trades and PnL are explicitly measured, and total risk-adjusted score is flat or better.
